cozy_corner: Your cozy corner for coffee and deserts
about_text:
At DuoCafe, we serve only 100% Specialty Arabica
hand-picked from high-altitude plantations in Ethiopia and Brazil.
Each bean undergoes careful artisan roasting to reveal a unique flavor profile:
from subtle floral notes to a rich chocolate finish.
We control every stage – from grind adjustment to the perfect serving temperature of your cup.
